pageContext.name: Be@rbrick Bunny 100% & 400%
pageContext.description: 'If you think you can just show up and take our top prize spots, you're wrong!'  Sideshow and Medicom Toy are proud to present the Be@rbrick Bunny 100% & 400% Set!   Standing at approximately 2.75 and 11.02 inches tall, this adorable Be@rbrick set brings Toy Story 4's Bunny straight from their top prize spot, right to your collection! A perfect companion to none other than Ducky, be sure to bring these feisty little friends home and into your Disney collection today!
